creator: weh@microsoft.com
text:
Another thing I can think of is the LA57 support on FreeBSD is not working on Hyper-V. But it is disabled on 13.1 by default as far as I know.

Maybe some new CPU features are supported well on FreeBSD. That's why I need to know the VM type and size to find out CPU type and other h/w spec.

By the way, I was able to boot FreeBSD 13.1 Gen2 VM on Intel Xeon 8260 (Cascade Lake) host in my lab.
